name: ios-image-metadata
description: Reference skill for image metadata work on iOS/macOS. Covers ImageIO APIs, EXIF, XMP, IPTC, GPS, TIFF, ICC, orientation mapping, metadata preservation, and interoperability across metadata standards and image formats.

plugins.name: ios-image-metadata-skill
plugins.description: Reference skill for image metadata work on iOS/macOS. Covers ImageIO APIs (CGImageSource, CGImageDestination, CGImageMetadata), EXIF, XMP, IPTC, GPS, TIFF, ICC, orientation mapping, metadata preservation, and interoperability across metadata standards and image formats.
